channel.title: Frontion News
channel.description: Strategic intelligence, delivered daily. Geopolitical briefings read aloud — listen on the go.
channel.itunes:author: Frontion News
channel.itunes:summary: Frontion News delivers concise, authoritative briefings on global geopolitics, defense, energy, finance, and technology — now available as daily audio.

item.title: The Ceasefire That Died — Weekly Brief, July 12, 2026
item.description: US-Iran ceasefire unravels, Hormuz choked to 23 ships/day, NATO pivots to Ankara, Ukraine's dual campaign, Le Pen launches presidential bid, climate disasters on three continents, Trump empties election commission, Syria delisted.
item.itunes:title: The Ceasefire That Died — Weekly Brief
